response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management beyond informal mentorship and lacks direct mobile-platform or organizational change leadership experience required for the role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record in open-source tooling and technical education (workshops, talks, libraries)
Broad technical stack across mobile, web, and embedded systems with demonstrated adaptability
concerns: No clear documentation of formal people management experience beyond technical leadership
Limited evidence of mobile-platform ecosystem experience despite iOS app maintenance
Absence of demonstrated organizational change leadership or roadmap ownership at scale
